system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.taoyeucau_capphat_vattu2","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TAOYEUCAU_CAPPHAT_VATTU2]
(
     @nguoitao   NVARCHAR (50),
     @nguoisua   NVARCHAR (50),
     @MADONHANG   NVARCHAR (100)
)
AS
--DECLARE @nguoitao   NVARCHAR (50) = 'admin';
--DECLARE @nguoisua   NVARCHAR (50) = 'admin';
--DECLARE @MADONHANG   NVARCHAR (100) = '002291';
DECLARE @ORDER TABLE
(
     MADONHANG     NVARCHAR (100),
     MASP          NVARCHAR (200),
     SOLUONG_DH    INT
)

INSERT INTO @ORDER (MADONHANG, MASP, SOLUONG_DH)
   SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number, SUM (A.order_qty) order_qty
   FROM tr_order_detail A
   WHERE     A.Finished = 0
         AND A.f_cancelled = 'N'
         AND A.order_number = @MADONHANG
   GROUP BY A.order_number, A.item_number


DECLARE @DINHMUC TABLE
(
     MADONHANG     NVARCHAR (100),
     MASP          NVARCHAR (200),
     MACT          NVARCHAR (200),
     SOLUONG_DM    DECIMAL (18, 3),
     SOLUONG_DH    INT,
     MAKHO         NVARCHAR (50)
)

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC ĐÓNG GÓI ***---
INSERT INTO @DINHMUC (MADONHANG,MASP,MACT,SOLUONG_DM,SOLUONG_DH,MAKHO)
   SELECT A.MADONHANG,
          A.MASP,
          B.madonggoi,
          B.soluong,
          A.SOLUONG_DH,
          'DGO' AS makho
   FROM @ORDER A INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_donggoi B ON A.MASP = B.masp
   WHERE B.hoanthanh = 1
   --ORDER BY A.MASP

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC NGŨ KIM ***---
INSERT INTO @DINHMUC (MADONHANG,MASP,MACT,SOLUONG_DM,SOLUONG_DH,MAKHO)
   SELECT A.MADONHANG,
          A.MASP,
          B.mavt,
          SUM (B.soluong),
          A.SOLUONG_DH,
          'NKI' AS makho
   FROM @ORDER A INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_ngukim B ON A.MASP = B.masp
   WHERE B.hoanthanh = 1
   GROUP BY A.MADONHANG,
            A.MASP,
            B.mavt,
            A.SOLUONG_DH
   --ORDER BY A.MASP

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC SƠN ***---
INSERT INTO @DINHMUC (MADONHANG,MASP,MACT,SOLUONG_DM,SOLUONG_DH,MAKHO)
   SELECT A.MADONHANG,
          A.MASP,
          B.mact,
          SUM (B.sl_sp),
          A.SOLUONG_DH,
          'SON' AS makho
   FROM @ORDER A INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son B ON A.MASP = B.masp
   WHERE B.hoanthanh = 1
   GROUP BY A.MADONHANG,
            A.MASP,
            B.mact,
            A.SOLUONG_DH
   --ORDER BY A.MASP

DECLARE @MAXROWS   INT;
DECLARE @CURRENTROW   INT = 1;

SELECT @MAXROWS = COUNT (*) FROM @DINHMUC;

DECLARE @TEMP TABLE
(
     ID            INT,
     MADONHANG     NVARCHAR (100),
     MASP          NVARCHAR (200),
     MACT          NVARCHAR (200),
     SOLUONG_DM    DECIMAL (18, 3),
     SOLUONG_DH    INT,
     MAKHO         NVARCHAR (50)
)

INSERT INTO @TEMP
SELECT ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY MASP ASC) AS ID,
       MADONHANG,
       MASP,
       MACT,
       SOLUONG_DM,
       SOLUONG_DH,
       MAKHO
FROM @DINHMUC

WHILE @CURRENTROW <= @MAXROWS
BEGIN
   DECLARE @MADONHANG1   NVARCHAR (100);
   DECLARE @MASP   NVARCHAR (200);
   DECLARE @MACT   NVARCHAR (200);
   DECLARE @TENCT   NVARCHAR (MAX);
   DECLARE @SOLUONG_DM   DECIMAL (18, 3);
   DECLARE @SOLUONG_DH   INT;
   DECLARE @SOLUONG_CAN   DECIMAL (18, 3);
   DECLARE @MAKHO   NVARCHAR (50);

   SELECT @MASP = A.MASP,
          @MACT = A.MACT,
          @TENCT = B.mota,
          @SOLUONG_DM = A.SOLUONG_DM,
          @SOLUONG_DH = A.SOLUONG_DH,
          @SOLUONG_CAN = (A.SOLUONG_DM * A.SOLUONG_DH),
          @MAKHO = A.MAKHO
   FROM @TEMP A, tr_material B WITH(NOLOCK)
   WHERE A.MACT = B.mavt AND B.xoa = 'N' AND A.ID = @CURRENTROW

   IF NOT EXISTS
         (SELECT *
          FROM tr_capphat_vattu2
          WHERE donhang = @MADONHANG AND masp = @MASP AND mact = @MACT AND active = 1)
      BEGIN
         EXEC TR_CAPPHAT_VATTU2_INSERT @MADONHANG,
                                        @MASP,
                                        @MACT,
                                        @TENCT,
                                        @SOLUONG_DM,
                                        @SOLUONG_CAN,
                                        0, @SOLUONG_CAN,
                                        0, @MAKHO, @nguoitao, @nguoisua

      END
     ELSE
     BEGIN
          EXEC TR_CAPPHAT_VATTU2_UPDATE @MADONHANG, @MASP, @MACT, @SOLUONG_DM, @SOLUONG_CAN, @MAKHO, @nguoisua
     END
     
   SET @CURRENTROW = @CURRENTROW + 1;
END


--*** ẨN NHỮNG CHI TIẾT ĐÃ BỊ XÓA KHỎI ĐỊNH MỨC ***--
DECLARE @XOAVATTU table
(
     donhang NVARCHAR(100), 
     masp NVARCHAR(200), 
     mact NVARCHAR(200)
)

INSERT INTO @XOAVATTU
SELECT donhang, masp, mact 
FROM tr_capphat_vattu2 WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE donhang = @MADONHANG
EXCEPT
SELECT MADONHANG, MASP, MACT FROM @DINHMUC

UPDATE tr_capphat_vattu2
SET active = 0
FROM tr_capphat_vattu2 A 
     INNER JOIN @XOAVATTU B
     ON A.donhang = B.donhang AND A.masp = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
--*** END ***--
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_capphat_vattu2","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_capphat_vattu2"],"flags":["has-while","has-group-by","has-window","calls-other-proc"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
